basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 39 posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad has released the official Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at esic.gov.in. A total of 39 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 69 years with qualifications as per latest NMC guidelines can attend the walk-in interview on 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines
qualification.details: As per latest NMC guidelines NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on "Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025" will apply.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - Anaesthesiology (with Surgical Super Speciality)

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated pay ₹2,60,226/- per month (Professor), ₹1,73,045/- per month (Associate Professor), ₹1,48,669/- per month (Assistant Professor)
salary_details.details: Professor: Consolidated pay ₹2,60,226/- per month Associate Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,73,045/- per month Assistant Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,48,669/- per month

selection_process: Academic credentials and interview performance Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Faridabad?
faq.answer: There are a total of 39 vacancies for Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad. These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly on the specified date and venue without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in interview date for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions is scheduled to be held on 21 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q4. What are the salary details for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post: Professor will receive ₹2,60,226/- per month, Associate Professor ₹1,73,045/- per month, and Assistant Professor ₹1,48,669/- per month on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the available information.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, specifically referencing the NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay ₹500, while SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on academic credentials and interview performance, followed by document verification. Candidates are advised to bring all original documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad located?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital is located in Faridabad, Haryana. The exact venue for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates. A set of self-attested photocopies of these documents is also required.
